if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND l.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbhMemberTokenLog :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_ta.code_label AS action_cd_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS token_type_cd_nm FROM mbh_member_token_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ta ON cd_ta.code_grp = 'TOKEN_ACTION' AND cd_ta.code_value = l.action_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TOKEN_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = l.token_type_cd WHERE l.log_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbhMemberTokenLog :: selectList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_ta.code_label AS action_cd_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS token_type_cd_nm FROM mbh_member_token_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ta ON cd_ta.code_grp = 'TOKEN_ACTION' AND cd_ta.code_value = l.action_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TOKEN_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = l.token_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbhMemberTokenLog :: selectPageList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_ta.code_label AS action_cd_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS token_type_cd_nm FROM mbh_member_token_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ta ON cd_ta.code_grp = 'TOKEN_ACTION' AND cd_ta.code_value = l.action_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TOKEN_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = l.token_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbhMemberTokenLog :: selectPageCount */ FROM mbh_member_token_log l
